description_long: This house is a single-story residential structure set within a rectangular plot, surrounded by a dense perimeter of coniferous trees that create a natural privacy barrier. The central area features a large, prominent deciduous tree, providing a focal point and shade to the main courtyard. The house itself is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes with flat roofs, arranged around the central tree and open green spaces. The exterior appears to be finished in a light gray material, likely concrete or stucco, with minimal ornamentation and a modern, geometric layout. There are multiple entry points and pathways leading through the tree-lined perimeter, suggesting easy access from different sides. The overall design emphasizes privacy, integration with nature, and a clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story house surrounded by dense coniferous trees, featuring flat roofs and a central courtyard with a large deciduous tree.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance pathway flanked by dense coniferous trees and the central tree visible behind the house.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the side entry and the arrangement of the house volumes around the central tree, with more of the green courtyard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the full extent of the tree perimeter, the central tree, and the geometric layout of the house volumes.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizes the tree-lined boundary and the relationship between the house, courtyard, and surrounding greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door accessed by a straight path, framed by dense trees, with no visible porch or decorative columns.
